properties.name: app.counseling.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the counseling system, e.g. https://counselling.unza.ac.zm

properties.name: app.counseling.service-token
properties.description: Optional static token override. When non-blank this is used directly instead of auto-login. Useful for testing; not recommended in production (tokens expire after 1 h).

properties.name: app.counseling.service-username
properties.description: Username of the service account in the counseling system (ROLE_COUNSELOR).
